name: ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 80,000
Insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 80,000
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 40,000

joiningBenefits: Welcome vouchers of shopping and travel worth Rs 5,000+ upon payment of the joining fee
milestoneBenefits: Earn 3,000 reward points on spending Rs 3,00,000 in an anniversary year
Earn 1,500 reward points for every subsequent Rs 1,00,000 spent in the same anniversary year, capped at 15,000 reward points per year
additionalBenefits: Two complimentary domestic railway lounge visits per quarter
25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at Rs 150 per ticket, twice a month (minimum 2 tickets), subject to spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of Rs 400 to Rs 4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps
Up to 4 complimentary golf rounds every month based on eligible monthly spends
additionalDetails: A transaction fee of 1% applies to utility payments exceeding Rs 50,000 per month
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank Rubyx credit card specifications.
Joining fee of Rs 3,000 and Annual fee of Rs 2,000. Annual fee is waived on spending Rs 3,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.
Domestic retail spends earn 2 reward points per Rs 100 spent (0.5% return value).
International spends earn 4 reward points per Rs 100 spent (1.0% return value).
Utility and insurance spends earn 1 reward point per Rs 100 spent (0.25% return value) and are capped at monthly spends of Rs 80,000.
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 40,000.
Offers 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to spending Rs 5,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Offers 2 complimentary domestic railway lounge visits per quarter (no spends criteria).
Offers 25% discount on movie tickets, capped at Rs 150 per ticket, twice a month (minimum 2 tickets), subject to spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Complimentary golf rounds (up to 4 per month) require spending Rs 50,000 per round in the previous calendar month.
Eligibility: Age must be 21-65 years; minimum net monthly salary of Rs 50,000 for salaried, and annual income/ITR of Rs 5,50,000 for self-employed.
